exception.message:
The request GET http://localhost:3000/api/v1/analytics/revenue with headers {'Accept'=>'application/json', 'Authorization'=>'Bearer test-worker-token-123', 'Content-Type'=>'application/json', 'User-Agent'=>'PowernodeWorker/1.0'} was expected to execute 1 time but it executed 0 times

The following requests were made:

GET http://localhost:3000/api/v1/analytics/revenue?end_date=2024-01-31&start_date=2024-01-01 with headers {'Accept'=>'application/json', 'Accept-Encoding'=>'gzip;q=1.0,deflate;q=0.6,identity;q=0.3', 'Authorization'=>'Bearer test-worker-token-123', 'Content-Type'=>'application/json', 'User-Agent'=>'PowernodeWorker/1.0'} was made 1 time
POST http://localhost:3000/api/v1/reports with body '{"report_type":"analytics","account_id":"account-123","parameters":{"start_date":"2024-01-01","end_date":"2024-01-31","metrics":["revenue","users"]}}' with headers {'Accept'=>'application/json', 'Accept-Encoding'=>'gzip;q=1.0,deflate;q=0.6,identity;q=0.3', 'Authorization'=>'Bearer test-worker-token-123', 'Content-Type'=>'application/json', 'User-Agent'=>'PowernodeWorker/1.0'} was made 1 time

============================================================
